auth.subtitle: Sign in with your household account to see the shared leftovers dashboard.
auth.scaffoldTitle: Foundation and auth are in place
auth.scaffoldSummary: Scaffolding, app shell routing, PocketBase auth wiring, PWA assets, and container files are ready for the dashboard data layer.

dashboard.title: Fridge
dashboard.headline: Track what needs attention before it turns into waste.
dashboard.body: Active leftovers are sorted by expiry date so the next thing to use is always at the top.
dashboard.emptyState: No leftovers! Your fridge is clear.
dashboard.loadErrorBody: The dashboard could not load leftovers right now. Check the PocketBase connection and try again.

addItem.title: Add Leftover
addItem.methodManualHint: Type the item and choose a category yourself.
addItem.methodAiHint: Take a photo and let AI estimate the item and expiry.
addItem.cameraHint: Use capture for a quick fridge shot, or upload one from your library.
addItem.cameraUnavailable: Camera access is unavailable. You can still upload a photo from your device.
addItem.fileFallback: Add a photo from your camera roll or file picker.
addItem.captureError: That photo could not be processed. Try another image or upload again.
addItem.saveError: The leftover could not be saved right now. Try again.
addItem.customDaysLabel: How many days will this last?

stats.title: Stats
stats.headline: See how often leftovers are saved versus wasted.
stats.body: Track completed leftovers over the last week, month, or your full history to spot waste patterns in the household.
stats.ratioBody: Based on leftovers marked finished in the selected period.
stats.loadErrorBody: The stats view could not load completed leftovers right now. Check the PocketBase connection and try again.
stats.emptyBody: Once items are marked as eaten or wasted, this view will show the totals and ratio for the selected period.

settings.title: Settings
settings.themeBody: Choose how Scraps should look on this device.
settings.languageBody: Change the app language used across the interface and AI responses.
settings.historyBody: Review deleted items and recent restorable activity.
settings.notificationsBody: Manage which reminders this device can receive.
settings.accountBody: See your signed-in account and session actions.

notifications.label: Notifications
notifications.promptBody: Get notified before your food expires
notifications.iosHint: Add Scraps to your Home Screen to enable notifications
notifications.typesBody: Choose which fridge reminders this device can receive.
notifications.masterToggleBody: Turn all push notifications for this device on or off.
notifications.expiringToggleBody: Send reminders when active leftovers are within 24 hours of expiring.
notifications.categoryBody: Filter expiry reminders by leftover category on this device.

pantry.title: Pantry
pantry.headline: Track what's in your kitchen before it runs out.
pantry.emptyHint: Tap the + button to add your first item.
pantry.addMethodPrompt: How would you like to add an item?
pantry.methodManualHint: Type the name and pick a category.
pantry.methodBarcodeHint: Use your camera to scan a product barcode.
pantry.methodAiHint: Take a photo and let AI identify the product.
pantry.saveError: Could not save the item. Try again.

scanner.title: Scan Barcode
scanner.alignBarcode: Align the barcode inside the frame and hold steady.
scanner.cameraUnavailable: Camera access is unavailable for barcode scanning.
scanner.lookupFailed: Could not look up this barcode right now. You can add the item manually.
scanner.productNotFound: No product was found for this barcode. You can still add it manually.

recipes.descriptionPlaceholder: A short note about the recipe or where it came from.
recipes.saveError: Could not save the recipe. Try again.
recipes.emptyHint: Add your household favourites so Scraps can match them against your pantry.
recipes.noCookableRecipes: No saved recipes are fully cookable with your current pantry.
recipes.unusedBody: These ingredients are not referenced by any saved recipe yet.

shoppingList.title: Shopping
shoppingList.headline: Keep track of what you still need to buy.
shoppingList.loadError: Could not load the shopping list.
shoppingList.emptyHint: Add items manually or generate missing ingredients from a saved recipe.
shoppingList.saveError: Could not save the shopping list item.
shoppingList.nothingMissing: You already have everything needed for this recipe.
shoppingList.noRecipeIngredients: This recipe has no required ingredients to add.
shoppingList.generateError: Could not generate shopping items from this recipe.

ai.identifyError: AI could not identify this item. You can continue manually.
ai.leftoverMethodPrompt: Choose how you want to add this leftover.
ai.parseRecipeError: AI could not parse that recipe. Try another source or enter it manually.
ai.generatePromptHint: Optional: tell AI the cuisine, style, or ingredient focus you want.
ai.generatePromptPlaceholder: e.g. Italian pasta, high protein, quick dinner
ai.generating: Creating a recipe from your pantry...
ai.generateError: AI could not generate a recipe right now.
